description: Smoke test manifest for amesh release verification. Each entry maps to a test script in tests/ that validates a specific shipped artifact.

tests.name: relay-image-boot
tests.description: Relay Docker image starts and /health returns {status:'ok'}

tests.name: relay-endpoints
tests.description: /ws returns 400 without upgrade, unknown paths return 404

tests.name: npm-install-sdk
tests.description: npm install @authmesh/sdk@VERSION with transitive deps at same version

tests.name: npm-exports-sdk
tests.description: Import SDK top-level + /middleware subpath, verify expected exports

tests.name: relay-ws-protocol
tests.description: Full WS pairing flow + M3 watcher hijack protection

tests.name: relay-ws-errors
tests.description: WS error responses: invalid OTC, unknown type

tests.name: binary-download
tests.description: Download linux binary tarball from GitHub Releases, verify valid gzip

tests.name: passphrase-envvar
tests.description: AUTH_MESH_PASSPHRASE env var honoured, no passphrase in identity.json

tests.name: passphrase-migration
tests.description: Legacy identity.json passphrase migrates to dedicated .passphrase file

categories.relay: Relay Docker image and WebSocket protocol
categories.npm: npm package installation and ESM export verification
categories.binary: GitHub Release binary download and execution
categories.h2-passphrase: H2 hardening: passphrase separation from identity.json
